nasb.text: He who keeps a royal command experiences no trouble, for a wise heart knows the proper time and procedure.

esv.text: Whoever keeps a command will know no evil thing, and the wise heart will know the proper time and the just way.

cnv.text: 遵守命令的，必不遭受災禍；智慧人的心，曉得時機，懂得判斷。

ccb.text: 遵从王命的必免遭祸患，因为智者心里懂得做事的时机和方法。

csbs.text: 遵守诫命的人必不遭遇祸患，智慧人的心懂得时机和次序；
